summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that TXN is currently testing its Daily 100MA support zone near $187.03. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 46.7%. This is a fresh test of the support, suggesting that optimal buy-side liquidity remains intact. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $230.05 and a significant trendline confluence around $224.48 (formed by 5 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
